topic: Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Large Language Models (LLMs), AI Industry News

relevance_criteria: New model releases or major version updates from recognized AI labs
Benchmark results with quantitative comparisons to baselines
Novel architectures, training techniques, or algorithmic breakthroughs
Official technical documentation or research papers
quality_indicators: Includes quantitative results (accuracy, perplexity, speed, cost metrics)
Provides code repository, model weights, or reproducible details
Compares with state-of-the-art baselines or previous versions
Discusses limitations, failure cases, or real-world applicability
reject_patterns: Model announcements without benchmark data or technical details
Opinion pieces or predictions without empirical evidence
Tutorial content without novel techniques or insights
Reposted news aggregation with no original analysis
